evals.prompt: Make my launch deck look good. We're Trailhead, a small-business scheduling app for hair salons and barbershops. It's a 10-slide investor-ish launch deck and I have Adobe Express.
evals.expected_output: An art-direction summary naming the impeccable direction dimensions, a distinctive type and color system with exact hex values and specific Adobe Fonts names, and a build-ready 16:9 (1920x1080) deck spec with Adobe Express production directions the client can reproduce. Visual register is bold, fast-to-grasp, conversion-focused per the small-business segment, and passes the anti-slop checklist. Saved to .vital/design/.
assertions: Art direction names specific heading and body fonts available in Adobe Fonts/Express (not default Inter or a generic system font)
Color palette lists exact hex values with light/dark logic, and avoids the banned cyan/purple gradient and glassmorphism-hero cliches
Output explicitly names the impeccable direction dimensions (register, expressive axis, tone, density, distinctiveness, audience, constraints)
Deck spec uses 16:9 at 1920x1080 per slide and includes copy blocks, color/font choices, imagery direction, and export format
Adobe Express production directions are step-followable (template type, Brand Kit setup, what to change, how to export) so the client can rebuild it themselves
The anti-slop checklist is run and its result stated before the asset ships, and the visual register matches the small-business segment (bold, fast to grasp)

evals.prompt: We need launch social creative and a landing page for Vaultline, an enterprise data-security platform sold to CISOs at regulated banks. Message and voice are in .vital/brand.md. Give me feed, story, and OG graphics plus the landing page.
evals.expected_output: Pulls message/voice from brand.md, sets one visual system matching the enterprise register (polished, restrained, trustworthy), and delivers build-ready specs for social assets at correct dimensions plus a single self-contained on-brand HTML landing page. All assets stay within one visual system and pass the anti-slop checklist.
assertions: Output pulls the message and voice from .vital/brand.md rather than inventing new copy
Social specs give exact dimensions for each surface: 1080x1080 feed, 1080x1920 story, 1200x630 OG/link preview
A single self-contained HTML landing page (inline CSS/JS) is produced, on-brand and ready to preview
Visual register matches the enterprise segment (polished, restrained, trustworthy) and the direction is placed on the impeccable dimensions
The anti-slop checklist is applied to every asset: no default Inter/system display face, no cyan/purple gradient, no glassmorphism hero, neutrals tinted
All assets share one consistent visual system (type, color, layout, imagery) rather than differing per asset

evals.prompt: Can you help with the visuals for our launch? We're Cohortiq, a mid-market analytics tool, and the hero graphic needs to show a chart of retention by cohort. I have the Adobe suite.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes a dataviz element is present and reads the dataviz skill before choosing chart colors and forms, sets a modern/confident mid-market visual system with named fonts and exact hex, and gives a build-ready asset spec routing heavier work to the right Adobe tool (e.g. Illustrator/Photoshop) while keeping the client able to reproduce it. Passes the anti-slop checklist.
assertions: Output indicates the dataviz skill guidance is consulted before choosing chart colors and chart form for the retention-cohort graphic
Art direction names specific non-default fonts and a palette with exact hex values, with the chart colors coherent with that palette
Visual register matches the mid-market segment (modern, confident) and the impeccable direction dimensions are named
Heavier production is routed to the correct Adobe tool (e.g. Illustrator for vector, Photoshop for compositing) while leaving the client able to rebuild and edit the asset
The anti-slop checklist is run: no cyan/purple gradient, no glassmorphism hero, no default system display font, neutrals tinted
The asset spec includes exact dimensions and export format
